# FI Digital UAE
> AI Agent Architects & Zoho Ecosystem Experts for UAE Enterprises

FI Digital is a Dubai-headquartered technology company that builds
AI-powered business automation using Zoho, n8n, Claude, Gemini,
and LangChain. We serve mid-market and enterprise businesses across
the UAE with bilingual (Arabic + English) solutions.

Licensed in Dubai since 2023. Offices in Dubai, Sydney, and India.

## Core Services
- [AI-Powered WhatsApp Sales Agents](https://fidigital.ae/digital-workers/whatsapp-sales-agents): Bilingual WhatsApp AI agents that qualify leads, answer queries, and process voice notes in Arabic and English. 4.2-second average response time.
- [Real Estate Lead Qualification](https://fidigital.ae/digital-workers/real-estate-agents): AI agents that qualify property inquiries on WhatsApp, score leads by budget/timeline/visa status, and sync to Zoho CRM.
- [Finance & Procurement Automation](https://fidigital.ae/digital-workers/finance-procurement-agents): AI agents that automate AP/AR, VAT filing, bank reconciliation, and procurement workflows integrated with Zoho Books.
- [Customer Service AI Agents](https://fidigital.ae/digital-workers/customer-service-agents): Multilingual support automation across WhatsApp, email, and chat integrated with Zoho Desk.
- [HR & Onboarding Automation](https://fidigital.ae/digital-workers/hr-onboarding-agents): End-to-end employee onboarding, leave management, and HR query handling via Zoho People.
- [Zoho Agentic AI Implementation](https://fidigital.ae/platform/zoho-agentic-ai): Enterprise Zoho implementation with AI agent layer using Zia, n8n, Claude, and Gemini.
- [n8n Workflow Orchestration](https://fidigital.ae/platform/n8n-orchestration): Self-hosted enterprise workflow automation connecting 400+ applications.
- [Custom AI Agent Development](https://fidigital.ae/platform/custom-ai-development): LangChain and Python-based custom AI agents with RAG, memory, and tool use.

## Industries Served
- Real Estate & PropTech
- Retail & E-Commerce
- Professional Services (Consulting, Legal, Accounting)
- Healthcare & Wellness
- F&B & Hospitality
- Logistics & Supply Chain

## Pricing
- Discovery Sprint: AED 15,000 - 25,000 (2-week diagnostic)
- Project-Based: AED 50,000 - 500,000+ (6-16 week implementation)
- Ongoing Partnership: AED 15,000 - 75,000/month (optimization & support)
